Cellanome Investment Research Report
·
March 2026 · Confidential
What Cellanome does
For twenty years, cell biology has been a forced choice.
You could watch what a cell does. Or you could read what it expresses. Not both. Not on the same cell.
Live Imaging
Transcriptomics
Only one was possible — until 2024.
The R3200 platform eliminates the choice. Observe a live cell's behavior over hours or days, then sequence its entire transcriptome — and computationally link the two. On the same cell. At scale.
Cellanome, Inc.
